hooks.command: jq -c 'if (.tool_input.command // "" | test("git commit")) then {hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"Commit landed — review the code you just committed for clarity, conciseness, and security issues. If you find simple, easy-to-fix issues (typos, dead imports, redundant code, missing clamps/escapes), fix them and amend into the current commit (`git add ... && git commit --amend --no-edit`). If you find more serious issues (design with multiple reasonable resolutions, real security concerns, missed edge cases), present the alternatives to the user and wait for input — do not silently choose. Nothing to flag — confirm in one sentence and move on. Skip diff narration; the user can see the diff."}} else empty end'
